text: In the archives of Forgotten Lore, she finds a whisper, not of a cure but of a source.
The shrine of Ethelgard, they called it, a place where the mountains own heart beats,
where the ancient power that gave dragons their fire can mend what is broken.
It is a legend, a myth told to hatchlings, but legends are built on the bones of truth,
and Karen has nothing left to believe in, but truth and a dying dragon.
